codeReview.summary: Manual scrutiny review passed. Reviewed the worker handoff for commit `25a303bd99547d902a0e09250d21f7356aa278f3`, the commit diff, and the new validation entrypoints. The implementation adds a focused repo-local PR parity runner in `scripts/pr_ci_parity.py`, exposes it through `.factory/services.yaml`, teaches `scripts/ci_risk_router.py` to classify the runner and services manifest as CI-infrastructure changes, and extends `testing/ci/test_pr_review_ci_packet.py` with contract coverage for routing, changed-coverage skip summaries, and merge-gate behavior. The runner mirrors the intended `pull_request` workflow shape by executing baseline checks, routed shard manifests, changed-files coverage aggregation, and a merge-gate style summary without widening product behavior. The single non-green parity execution reported in the handoff was the expected proof that the new runner surfaces a real changed-coverage gap on the active branch rather than masking it, so there are no blocking review issues in this feature.

summary: Pass. Added a reusable local PR CI parity runner plus services-manifest wiring and CI contract tests, and verified it reproduces routed shard, changed-files coverage, and merge-gate behavior locally during the GitHub Actions billing outage.
